description: Shadow Dusknoir lead acts as both a safe and hard-hitting lead with ghost typing and Dynamic Punch for fighting coverage. Two extremely bulky normal types in the back (Lickilicky safe swap, Wigglytuff closer) that resist ghost and cover each other's weaknesses.

Triple shadow glass cannon team that forgoes bulk entirely for maximum damage output. Shadow Ball + Dynamic Punch on Toxicroak gives unresisted coverage, Electivire nukes with Wild Charge, and Toucannon closes with Beak Blast.
performanceNotes: Shadow Ball + Dynamic Punch combo on Toxicroak hits nearly everything hard with shadow boost
Toucannon repeatedly sweeps remaining teams as a closer, even handling anti-flyers like Bastiodon
Won every featured battle convincingly, multiple opponents quit early

description: Triple water team built around Mud Bomb Shadow Quagsire, created by Lucky Boy. The triple water core means hard counters to Carbink, Clodsire, and similar rock/ground types, while Mud Bomb provides surprise factor over the expected Stone Edge.

Mud Bomb surprise factor wins leads that Stone Edge Quagsire would lose (e.g. vs Empoleon)
Triple water punishes teams with Carbink or Clodsire as all three Pokemon hard counter them
